basic_attack.descriptionKey: Basic Attack varies based on a weapon choice.

charged_attack.descriptionKey: To perform hold the basic attack button

active_skill.descriptionKey: Active Skill varies based on a weapon choice.

passive_skill.descriptionKey: Your MC and Him each have their own Passive Skill

support_skill.descriptionKey: Click to check his Support Skill for that companion

resonance_skill.descriptionKey: Click to check specifics of Resonance Skill for that companion

ardent_oath.descriptionKey: Click to check specifics of Ardent Oath for that companion. Oath is your Ultimate Ability.

perfect_dodge.descriptionKey: You can trigger it when dodging right before the enemy attacks you. It activates Support Skill even if its cooldown is not up yet.

oath_recovery.descriptionKey: A β Protocore that speeds up your ultimate (Oath) recovery. Allows you to use your Oath twice per battle instead of once.

expedited_energy.descriptionKey: A β Protocore that speeds up your special energy (◆) recovery. The faster you regenerate it, the sooner you can use your Resonance Skill and Active Skill again.

dmg_to_weakened.descriptionKey: A δ Protocore that boosts damage taken on weakened enemies, i.e. enemies with broken shields.

crit_dmg.descriptionKey: A δ Protocore that increases your CRIT DMG. It multiplies your damage by the CRIT DMG percentage when you score a critical hit. It only applies when you score a critical hit, which depends on your CRIT Rate.

crit_rate.descriptionKey: A δ Protocore that increases your CRIT Rate. It shows the chance of scoring a critical hit. For example, 50% means a 1 in 2 chance to multiply your damage by your CRIT DMG.

stellactrum_match.descriptionKey: Each card has its color. On each stage there's a color requirement. When you match all colors, your Resonance Skill can destroy 2 layers of enemy shield instead of 1.

mc.descriptionKey: Main Character, in other words, You!

aoe.descriptionKey: Area of Effect: an ability that affects enemies in the radius

hunter_firearm.descriptionKey: A weapon from Standard Hunter Series.

flame_lily.descriptionKey: Artist's special ability. Different skills summon them, which activate buffs.

scarlet_shade.descriptionKey: Artist's Support Skill. It creates Flame Lilies

tinctus.descriptionKey: Fresh Paint's special ability. Inflict Tinctus to get buffs.

reprise.descriptionKey: Phantom Of The Siren's special ability. Reprise is summoned by Support Skill.

echo.descriptionKey: Phantom Of The Siren's special ability. Echo is a part of his Passive Skill.

aria.descriptionKey: Phantom Of The Siren's Support Skill.

fishtail_beacon.descriptionKey: Abysswalker's special ability. It is a part of his Support Skill. Restores 2 Potential

potential.descriptionKey: Abysswalker's special ability. It has 6 stacks, check them under MC's HP bar.

beacon.descriptionKey: Abysswalker's special ability. It is a part of his Passive Skill. Restores 1 Potential

burn.descriptionKey: Continuous damage status abnormality inflicted on enemies. Can be inflicted by some skills of Abysswalker and Artist.

deepsea_pursuit.descriptionKey: CRIT Rate buff that appears at full Potential stacks.

searing_slash.descriptionKey: Rafayel's special attack that is triggered at full Potential stacks.

sea_spirit.descriptionKey: God Of The Tides' special ability. Both his Passive Skill and yours can summon them. It has 3 levels.

heavenly_rain.descriptionKey: God Of The Tides' special ability. Triggers at full Faith and provides buffs.

faith.descriptionKey: God Of The Tides' special ability. It is located under MC's HP bar. Hits from you, Rafayel and Sea Spirits fill it up.

tidal_field.descriptionKey: God Of The Tides' special ability. It can be triggered by Active Skill and provides buffs when you stay inside it.

surging_tides.descriptionKey: God Of The Tides' Resonance Skill. Click to learn more.

sea_god_mark.descriptionKey: Lemurian Sea God's special ability. It recharges over time. Charged Attack can consume it to empower your attack, especially during Divine Favor.

ocean_descent.descriptionKey: Lemurian Sea God's special ability. It is located under MC's HP bar. Your attacks fill left part of it, while Rafayel's Passive Skill fills the right part.

divine_favor.descriptionKey: Lemurian Sea God's special ability. You can activate it by filling Ocean's Descent and pressing the button that appears. In that state, consuming Sea God Mark deals more damage, using Active Skill creates a Lightning Crystal on the field, dodge into it deal AoE DMG.

lightning_tide.descriptionKey: Damage explosion after triggering Lightning Crystal in Divine Favor state.

lightning_crystal.descriptionKey: Lemurian Sea God's special ability. When using Active Skill in Divine Favor a ball will appear, dodge in it to activate.

hunters_intention.descriptionKey: Hunter Sword's Passive Skill. Provides an ATK buff

gathering_stacks.descriptionKey: Hunter Claymore's special ability. On 3 stacks greatly empowers your Active Skill allowing you to skip the charge stage.

bingdi_lotus.descriptionKey: A two-part mark applied to enemies. Consists of Yin and Yang halves. When both halves are on the same enemy, they merge and trigger a Bloom.

bingdi_lotus_yin.descriptionKey: The dark half of Bingdi Lotus. Applied by Paired Knot: Yin and other specific attacks.

bingdi_lotus_yang.descriptionKey: The light half of Bingdi Lotus. Applied by Paired Knot: Yang and other specific attacks.

lotus_seed.descriptionKey: A resource you carry (max 1). Gained when your Active Skill hits an enemy. Consumed by Charged Attack to apply the missing Bingdi Lotus half. While holding it, you are unstoppable.

yin_yang_cycle.descriptionKey: A passive ability that tracks your transformation cooldown (33s baseline). When cast, you and Caleb enter Yin-Yang Union state. Bloom effects reduce its cooldown by 3s each time.

yin_yang_union.descriptionKey: Your empowered burst state. Replaces your Active Skill with Azure Ballad and your Support Skill with Spectral Slash. You become unstoppable for its duration.

yin_yang_rift.descriptionKey: A tear in reality summoned by certain skills during Yin-Yang Union. Pulls in enemies, deals AoE damage, and makes your next Azure Ballad cost 0 Energy.

sword_stance.descriptionKey: A brief pose entered after certain attacks (Severance Dance or the third basic attack). While in this state, tap Basic Attack for Paired Knot: Yang or hold for Paired Knot: Yin.

azure_ballad.descriptionKey: Your Active Skill during Yin-Yang Union. Costs 1 Energy Charge. On hit, activates a Yin-Yang Rift. The next Azure Ballad after a rift activation costs 0 Energy.

spectral_slash.descriptionKey: Your Support Skill during Yin-Yang Union. Cooldown 3.1s. Tears open a Yin-Yang Rift on hit. Use on cooldown for maximum rift uptime.

netherseal_slash.descriptionKey: Your Support Skill outside Yin-Yang Union. Cooldown 9s. Caleb charges forward and applies the missing Bingdi Lotus half to enemies hit.

bloom.descriptionKey: Triggered when an enemy receives both halves of Bingdi Lotus. Deals massive damage, restores 0.5 Energy Charge, and reduces Yin-Yang Cycle cooldown by 3s.

dustbreak.descriptionKey: A timed button press during Fate Unforgotten (Ardent Oath). 3 prompts appear. Each perfect press heals 5% Max HP. All 3 perfect = 20% DMG Reduction for 15s.

paired_knot.descriptionKey: A passive ability active during Sword Stance. Tap Basic Attack for Paired Knot: Yang (applies Bingdi Lotus: Yang). Hold Basic Attack for Paired Knot: Yin (applies Bingdi Lotus: Yin).

paired_knot_yin.descriptionKey: A special basic attack from Sword Stance. Applies Bingdi Lotus: Yin. Counts as the final hit of your basic attack combo.

paired_knot_yang.descriptionKey: A special basic attack from Sword Stance. Applies Bingdi Lotus: Yang. Counts as the final hit of your basic attack combo.

ghost.descriptionKey: A debuff applied at Netherlord Rank 1+. If a Ghost-marked enemy is marked again, they take bonus damage. Removed when Yin-Yang Union ends.

severance_dance.descriptionKey: Netherlord's Active Skill. Cooldown 6s, costs 1 Energy. A two-hit combo that puts you into Sword Stance. Hitting an enemy grants 1 Lotus Seed.

soulguide_bell.descriptionKey: Netherlord's Resonance Skill. Cooldown 15s, costs 2 Energy. Pulls in enemies and reduces Yin-Yang Cycle cooldown by 3s.

fate_unforgotten.descriptionKey: Netherlord's Ardent Oath (ultimate ability). Features 3 Dustbreak timed presses. At higher ranks, can critically strike.

azure_cleave.descriptionKey: Netherlord's basic attack. A 3-hit combo. The final hit applies a random Bingdi Lotus half. After the third hit, you enter Sword Stance.

darknight_reign.descriptionKey: Xavier's 9-second empowered state. Activated by Darknight Coronation. Your Active Skill changes to The Chosen One's Blessing, and Xavier deals bonus damage.

darknight_coronation.descriptionKey: The skill that triggers Darknight Reign. 30s cooldown. Appears as an extra button in battle when you have 3 Lumenflora Stamens.

last_words.descriptionKey: A resource accumulated outside Darknight Reign (max 3 stacks). Consumed by Final Elegy (Active Skill) to reduce Darknight Coronation cooldown and gain Lumenflora Stamens.

lumenflora_stamen.descriptionKey: A resource (max 3 stacks). Carried into Darknight Reign to reduce the initial cooldown of The Chosen One's Blessing by 3.4s per stack.

the_chosen_ones_blessing.descriptionKey: Your Active Skill during Darknight Reign. Creates Radiant Ripples beneath you. Can be cast up to 3 times per Reign.

radiant_ripples.descriptionKey: AoE field created by The Chosen One's Blessing. Deals damage. At higher ranks, Xavier can create them too.

lumenflora.descriptionKey: Flower field created by Lumenflora Grace (Resonance Skill). During Darknight Reign, Royal Seal blooms additional Lumenflora for AoE damage.

prayer.descriptionKey: King of Darknight's basic attack. A 4-hit combo. Charged Attack shoots a ray of radiant light.

final_elegy.descriptionKey: King of Darknight's Active Skill. Cooldown 12s, costs 1 Energy. Within 2.7s of casting, if you have Last Words, you may cast again with enhanced damage.

royal_seal.descriptionKey: King of Darknight's Support Skill. Cooldown 15s. Xavier pierces enemies, dealing damage and granting 1 stack of Last Words. Cooldown ends in 5s when entering or exiting Darknight Reign.

lumenflora_grace.descriptionKey: King of Darknight's Resonance Skill. Cooldown 15s, costs 2 Energy. Xavier leaps and strikes, blooming a sea of Lumenflora that gathers enemies.

royal_decree.descriptionKey: King of Darknight's Ardent Oath (ultimate). Xavier summons a giant sword to strike enemies. Deals massive damage.

coronation.descriptionKey: King of Darknight's Passive Skill. Manages the Darknight Reign state, Last Words accumulation, and Stamen generation.

procession.descriptionKey: King of Darknight's Passive Skill. First Active Skill hit recovers 0.45 Energy. During Darknight Reign, damage dealt and DMG Boost to Weakened are increased by 8%.

deity_of_niava.descriptionKey: Zayne's 10-second empowered state. Enter by removing all 3 Divine Shackles and casting Bind Gaze. During this state, Soul Rifts are revealed and can be shattered with Charged Attacks.

divine_shackles.descriptionKey: Zayne's starting debuff (3 stacks). Remove them by stacking Arrow Marks on enemies. When all shackles are removed, Bind Gaze becomes available.

golden_arrows.descriptionKey: Resource loaded by Basic Attacks (max 4). Fired by Charged Attack. Each hit leaves an Arrow Mark on the enemy.

remnant_feather.descriptionKey: Left behind by fired Golden Arrows. Lasts 5 seconds. Converted back to Golden Arrows when your Active Skill hits an enemy.

remnant_feathers.descriptionKey: Left behind by fired Golden Arrows. Lasts 5 seconds. Converted back to Golden Arrows when your Active Skill hits an enemy.

arrow_mark.descriptionKey: Stacks on enemies from Golden Arrow hits (max 4 stacks). At maximum stacks, removes 1 Divine Shackle and triggers Terminus Arrow.

terminus_arrow.descriptionKey: Zayne's follow-up attack when Arrow Mark reaches max stacks. Deals damage and restores 5% Max HP to both you and Zayne.

soul_rift.descriptionKey: Revealed on enemies during Deity of Niava state. Shatter with Charged Attack for bonus damage. Reappears 6s after being shattered.

soul_rifts.descriptionKey: Revealed on enemies during Deity of Niava state. Shatter with Charged Attack for bonus damage. Reappears 6s after being shattered.

divine_sever.descriptionKey: Replaces Endbringer Arrow during Deity of Niava. Counts as Charged Attack damage. Refreshed by shattering an enemy's Soul Rift.

bind_gaze.descriptionKey: The skill that triggers Deity of Niava. Appears when all Divine Shackles are removed.

rupture_mark.descriptionKey: Applied by Charged Attack's second slash. Deals damage over time for 2 seconds.

order_rupture.descriptionKey: God of Annihilation's basic attack. A 4-hit combo using Divine Grip. Charged Attack applies Rupture Mark.

divine_judgment.descriptionKey: God of Annihilation's Active Skill. Cooldown 10s, costs 1 Energy. Thrust forward dealing damage. Within 4s, becomes free Divine Slash.

divine_slash.descriptionKey: Free Active Skill available within 4s after Divine Judgment. Swing, leap, slam, and fire all Golden Arrows at the target. Does not cost Energy.

endbringer_arrow.descriptionKey: God of Annihilation's Support Skill. Cooldown 10s. Zayne fires a piercing arrow that explodes on first hit. Cannot be used during Deity of Niava.

divinity_order.descriptionKey: God of Annihilation's Resonance Skill. Cooldown 15s, costs 2 Energy. Zayne gathers enemies while you ready Divine Grip, striking with divine arrows.

aengru_radiance.descriptionKey: God of Annihilation's Ardent Oath (ultimate). You and Zayne enter the Aengru Field, forming a divine golden bow to unleash a devastating strike.

fateful_bond.descriptionKey: God of Annihilation's Passive Skill. Manages Divine Shackles, Golden Arrows, Remnant Feathers, Arrow Marks, and the Deity of Niava transformation.

divine_grip.descriptionKey: God of Annihilation's exclusive weapon. Used for Order Rupture basic attacks and Divine Slash.
